name: iShares Silver Trust
summary: The iShares Silver Trust (SLV) is a grantor trust formed under New York law whose purpose is to own physical silver transferred in exchange for shares. Each share represents a fractional undivided beneficial interest in the Trust's net assets, primarily silver held by JPMorgan Chase Bank N.A., London Branch. The Trust is sponsored by iShares Delaware Trust Sponsor LLC, a BlackRock subsidiary, and listed on NYSE Arca under ticker SLV.
